profile_summary: AI Engineer and Solution Architect with hands-on experience in designing and deploying production-grade, end-to-end AI systems.[cite: 1] Proficient in Deep Learning, Computer Vision, NLP, LLMs, RAG architectures, and Agentic AI automation using Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, HuggingFace Transformers, LangGraph, and FastAPI.[cite: 1] Skilled in model fine-tuning, REST API integration, and building scalable cloud infrastructure for complex workflows.[cite: 1] Specialized in multilingual low-resource NLP including Urdu-English language models.[cite: 1] Currently pursuing a Bachelor's in Artificial Intelligence, driven to architect robust AI solutions for real-world problems.[cite: 1]

responsibilities: Working as a remote AI/ML Intern, focusing on developing and optimizing machine learning models for real-world applications.[cite: 1]
Applying knowledge of artificial intelligence to build data-driven solutions and contributing to innovative ML pipelines.[cite: 1]
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to research, prototype, and evaluate AI models.[cite: 1]
Designing and integrating a custom AI chatbot into a core Flutter mobile application for end users.[cite: 1]
Collaborating with the mobile development team to bridge the gap between ML models and mobile interface, ensuring a smooth conversational experience.[cite: 1]
Deployed REST APIs to connect AI inference backend with Flutter frontend for real-time responses.[cite: 1]
Spearheaded AI automation initiatives, onboarding 3+ enterprise clients within the first month and delivering custom NLP solutions.[cite: 1]
Deployed Agentic AI workflows that eliminated approx. 10 hours/week of manual data entry, increasing client efficiency by 25%.[cite: 1]
Built custom chatbots using NLP libraries to handle customer support queries autonomously, reducing response time by 40%.[cite: 1]
Managed end-to-end development from client requirement gathering to deployment on cloud infrastructure.[cite: 1]

projects.name: Autonomous GTM AI Engine[cite: 1]
description: Engineered a distributed asynchronous Lead Discovery Pipeline utilizing concurrent.futures to scrape, validate, and deduplicate B2B leads across 7+ sources, bypassing WAFs via Playwright Stealth.[cite: 1]

Architected an event-driven automation bridge using Redis and Celery workers for background task queuing, ensuring 100% data retention and non-blocking API performance under heavy processing loads.[cite: 1]

Designed a multi-agent LangGraph state machine (Researcher, Strategist, Copywriter) integrated with local LLMs (Ollama, Llama-3.2, Qwen-2.5) for intelligent profiling and hyper-personalized cold email generation.[cite: 1]
Deployed a robust FastAPI backend with PostgreSQL (pgvector) to enforce state persistence, comprehensive audit logging, and a Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) gateway for strict quality control.[cite: 1]

projects.name: Multimodal Agentic Sales AI[cite: 1]
description: Architected a strict 9-stage finite state machine using LangGraph to guarantee deterministic sales workflows and eliminate LLM hallucinations during negotiations.[cite: 1]
Integrated GPT-4o Vision and Whisper API to process multimodal inputs (documents, voice) and built a pure-Python pricing engine ensuring 100% calculation accuracy.[cite: 1]
Designed a hybrid memory architecture (Redis & MongoDB) for long-term context retention, preventing repetitive data collection from returning users.[cite: 1]
Deployed an asynchronous FastAPI backend featuring Stripe payment integration and automated data synchronization with a custom CRM.[cite: 1]

projects.name: Multilingual Banking Chatbot[cite: 1]
description: Architected a dual-language (English & Urdu) NLP model architecture tailored for the banking sector.[cite: 1]

Designed an intent-recognition and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline using Pinecone vector database to ground LLM responses in real-time financial context, effectively eliminating hallucinations.[cite: 1]
Trained on 8,000+ labeled Urdu/English banking queries across 20+ intent categories.[cite: 1]
Deployed via REST API enabling real-time inference for financial query resolution.[cite: 1]

projects.name: Animal Species Detection AI[cite: 1]
description: Engineered a CNN achieving 94% accuracy across 90+ distinct animal species using Transfer Learning.[cite: 1]
Reduced inference time to under 200ms by integrating the model with a high-performance Next.js frontend.[cite: 1]
Deployed the full-stack solution on Vercel and Hugging Face, serving real-time predictions to users.[cite: 1]

projects.name: Zintel AI - AI SaaS Platform[cite: 1]
description: Designed and deployed a full-stack AI SaaS platform offering AI Chatbot Development, Agentic AI Solutions, and AI-powered web applications for businesses.[cite: 1]
Built a dual-dashboard architecture a comprehensive Admin Panel for service management and analytics, and a User Dashboard for personalized AI solution access.[cite: 1]
Architected platform with REST API, Webhook, and SDK integrations enabling seamless embedding of AI capabilities into existing business workflows.[cite: 1]
Implemented end-to-end encrypted infrastructure with real-time processing and auto-scaling for high-performance AI service delivery.[cite: 1]
